beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.
